basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Project Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for MTS, Project Associate and RA Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu)
basic_details.post_name: Project Staff (RA-III, Project Associate-I, Multi-tasking Staff)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Project Staff (RA-III, Project Associate-I, Multi-tasking Staff) posts! Published on 13 May 2026 at IIT Jammu Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 7 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum 35 years age group and possessing Bachelor’s, Master’s, or Doctoral degrees in relevant engineering and science fields with required experience can apply online from 13-05-2026 to 26-05-2026. Find all details about the IIT Jammu Project Staff new vacancy 2026, including e

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Upper age limit: 35 years (Relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Women/PH)
age_limit.details: RA-III: Maximum age is 35 years. Project Associate-I: Maximum age is 35 years. Multi-tasking Staff: Maximum age is 35 years. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Women/Physically Handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's/Master's/Doctoral degrees in relevant engineering and science fields with specific experience.
qualification.details: RA-III: Four-year Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 75% marks (or 7.5/10 CGPA) throughout academic career starting from Class XII, in Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, or Computer Science and Engineering. A valid GATE score is preferred. Eight years' experience in R&D in industrial or academic institutions, S&T organizations, or in scientific activities and services, out of which four years must be in science and technology programme planning, development, and co-operation. OR M.Tech/M.E. degree with a minimum of 75% marks (or 7.5/10 CGPA) throughout academic career starting from Class XII, in Embedded Systems, Electronics and Communication Engineering, VLSI, IoT, Wireless Communication, Computer Science, or a related discipline, along with a B.Tech/B.E. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, or Computer Science and Engineering. A valid GATE score is preferred. AND Six years' experience in R&D in industrial or academic institutions, S&T organizations, or in scientific activities and services. OR Doctoral Degree (Ph.D.) in Embedded Systems, Electronics and Communication Engineering, VLSI, IoT, Wireless Communication, Computer Science, or a related field, along with an M.Tech/M.E. degree in any of the above disciplines and a B.Tech/B.E. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, or Computer Science and Engineering. Project Associate-I: B.Tech/B.E. degree in either Electronics and Communication Engineering or Computer Science and Engineering, with a minimum of 60% marks (or 6.5/10 CGPA) throughout their academic career starting from Class XII. A valid GATE score is preferred. Multi-tasking Staff: Degree in any domain with computer knowledge.

salary_details.details: RA-III: ₹67,000 + HRA as applicable Project Associate-I: (i) ₹37,000 + HRA as applicable (NET/GATE or National-level exam qualified) (ii) ₹30,000 + HRA as applicable (Others) Multi-tasking Staff: (i) ₹18,000 + HRA as applicable

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirements Interview (Online/Offline)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jammu Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IIT Jammu Project Staff positions is 26th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at IIT Jammu?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for Project Staff positions at IIT Jammu. These include RA-III, Project Associate-I, and Multi-tasking Staff roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: For the Project Associate-I post, a B.Tech/B.E. degree in either Electronics and Communication Engineering or Computer Science and Engineering with a minimum of 60% marks (or 6.5/10 CGPA) is required.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 5 years for candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC/Women/Physically Handicapped categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the RA-III position?
faq.answer: The salary for the RA-III position is ₹67,000 plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as applicable.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates apply offline for these positions?
faq.answer: No, applications must be submitted online through the official IIT Jammu application portal. Offline applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these Project Staff roles?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by an interview, which can be conducted online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Jammu offer any application fee concessions?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for these positions. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the educational requirement for the Multi-tasking Staff position?
faq.answer: The Multi-tasking Staff position requires a Degree in any domain along with basic computer knowledge.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the direct links to the official notification PDF and the online application portal in the "Important Links" section of this article.
